commands.review_summary:
The PR adds role-aware CLI help audiences so logged-out/user help hides moderator/admin root, package, and trusted-publisher commands while tests cover filtered typo/error help.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the PR's option-only fallback treats `clawhub -V` and `clawhub --cli-version` as help, then `resolveHelpRole` can call `/api/v1/whoami`. I did not execute the PR branch because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A focused automated repair can exempt version flags from help-role lookup and add the required changelog entry without changing the role-audience design.

target.title: fix: gate privileged cli help by role
